rulings.Case Title: DENNIS HUMPHRIES VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIAL CO.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Setting Aside Default And Default Judgment Entered Against James A.Nelson, Co., Inc.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 16, 2017 in Department 503, Line 1. Specially appearing Century Indemnity Company's motion for an order setting aside default and default judgment entered against James A. Nelson, Co., Inc. is continued to February 23, 2017 on the court's own motion and pursuant to Uniform Local Rules of Court, Rules 2.7(B) and 2.11 (T). Century failed to lodge a courtesy copy of its moving papers with Department 503. It must lodge one by February 16, 2017 at 4:00p.m. = (503/CML)

rulings.Case Title: JERRY CHARLIFUE et al VS. ALLIED PACKING & SUPPLY, INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Appoint Successor-In-Interest To Deceased Plaintiff And To File First Amended Complaint/Notice Of Motion
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 16, 2017 in Department 503, Line 2. Plaintiffs' motion for leave to appoint successor-in-interest to deceased plaintiff and to file first amended complaint is continued to February 23, 2017 on the court's own motion and pursuant to Uniform Local Rules of Court, Rules 2.7(B) and 2.11 (T). Plaintiffs failed to lodge a courtesy copy of their moving papers with Department 503. They must lodge one by February 16, 2017 at 4:00p.m. = (503/CML)

rulings.Case Title: YVONNE FRISBIE ET AL VS. CRANE CO. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT On Behalf Of Insured Marconi Plastering, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 16, 2017 in Department 503, Line 3. Intervenors Massachusetts Bay Insurance Company, et al.'s (on behalf of Marconi Plastering Company, Inc.) motion for summary judgment is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (503/CML)

rulings.Case Title: ROGER HUWE VS. METROPOLITAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 16, 2017 in Department 503, Line 4. Defendant Borg-Warner Corp.'s motion for summary judgment is off calendar. Defendant was dismissed January 20, 2017. = (503/CML)

rulings.Case Title: LINDA PONCHIONE VS. CONSOLIDATED INSULATION, INC.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 16, 2017 in Department 503, Line 5. Defendant CSK Auto, Inc.'s motion for summary adjudication is continued to March 9, 2017 on the court's own motion and pursuant to Uniform Local Rules of Court, Rules 2.7(B) and 2.11(T). Defendant failed to lodge courtesy copies of its moving papers and its reply with Department 503. It must lodge such courtesy copies by February 17, 2017 at 4:00p.m. = (503/CML)
